overall_summary: ElizaOS development focused on finalizing the Product 2 Cloud Apps infrastructure, featuring per-tenant isolation and significant modularization of the core framework. However, the system faces several reported technical blockers including UI rendering failures on Windows and cloud access invitation errors.
key_facts: PR #8293 launched the Eliza Cloud Apps data plane, implementing per-tenant container isolation and automated environment provisioning.
The monolithic plugin-lifeops was decomposed into six specialized modular plugins to improve framework flexibility.
Steward login in production was reported broken due to OAuth code_challenge requirements and email sending failures.
A major collaboration proposal totaling $7,500 USDC for Semantic Delegation using ERC-7710 was submitted by saulodigital.
Users reported a persistent blank screen issue on Windows when running 'bun run dev:ui' despite cache clearing.
The Babylon platform and related social media components were confirmed to be on hold by odilitime.
ElizaOS achieved coding parity with Claude Code and Codex following the launch of its coding workbench.
All development work has been consolidated into a single primary eliza repository.
open_questions: How can the white/blank screen issue when running 'bun run dev:ui' on Windows be resolved?
How can users bypass the tenant invitation requirement error when joining elizaCloud?
Is it technically feasible to bridge elizaOS from BNB to Solana?
Are there any upcoming updates for the Milady development branch considering the silent GitHub activity?

new_issues_prs.title: Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) — per-tenant-isolated container hosting
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Core infrastructure for Product 2 enabling multi-tenant isolation and automated hosting.

new_issues_prs.title: refactor(lifeops): split plugin-lifeops into focused plugins
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Major architectural refactor of a primary monolith into more maintainable specialized plugins.

new_issues_prs.title: Steward login broken in prod: OAuth authorize 400
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Critical blocker for cloud login flows addressed during this period.

overall_focus.claim: The project is undergoing a transition to a modular, automated cloud infrastructure model to reduce manual operations.

discord_updates.summary: Discussions covered humanitarian robot orders (link was dead), the status of hiring (currently no active hiring), and the launch of the coding workbench achieving parity with industry benchmarks.
Technical issues regarding Windows UI blank screens and elizaCloud tenant errors dominated user queries, alongside inquiries into cross-chain bridging.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users are frustrated with the inability to join elizaCloud due to invitation errors and access restrictions through Milady.

strategic_insights.insight: The decomposition of monoliths into specialized plugins (like lifeops to six plugins) suggests a strategic shift toward an ecosystem where third parties can more easily extend specific functionalities without core bloat.
implications_or_questions: Will this increase the barrier to entry for new developers depending on documentation quality?
How will plugin inter-dependency be managed?

market_analysis.observation: Active fraudulent activity regarding ai16z token migration was detected and mitigated by the community.
market_analysis.relevance: Protects community assets and maintains trust in the official ecosystem communication channels.
